requirement-analyst.description: Analyse ADU scope, identify boundaries, clarify acceptance criteria, and flag risks.

context-pack.description: Generate shared context and code/test map for an ADU.

detail-designer.description: Produce actionable detailed design based on requirement analysis and code context.

contract.description: Create or refine ADU contract and acceptance assertions.

testwriter.description: Write failing tests or validation scripts before implementation.

developer.description: Implement the minimal code needed to satisfy the contract and tests.

buildfix-debugger.description: Run validation, diagnose failure, and apply minimal debug fixes.

evidence.description: Collect evidence bundle and decide whether MVP debug can start.

code-reviewer.description: Review developer changes against approved analysis, detailed design, hard contract, tests, security boundaries, and maintainability rules.

acceptance-reviewer.description: Verify final implementation against hard contract and approved requirement/design before evidence is created.

project-profiler.description: Analyze a local Git repository and generate a generic project profile plus project knowledge pack.

adu-intake-agent.description: Convert raw requirement text and uploaded files into a structured ADU draft.

system-flow-designer.description: Design end-to-end system flows, call graphs, data flows, and hard integration acceptance points for an Epic.

adu-splitter.description: Decide whether an Epic should be a single ADU or split into a DAG of child ADUs.

rework-planner.description: Convert quality gate failures into a minimal, executable developer rework plan.

epic-acceptance-reviewer.description: Verify the whole Epic end-to-end after all required child ADUs are evidenced.
